block_01: Despite what most people think, trading is complex. It is not a guessing game, but an activity that requires strategy and analysis from the trader. There is no easy way to offset its difficulties, but we can help you to overcome some of them.
block_02: This piece will tell you about the complexities of trading and how to avoid some difficulties that you will find on your way.
block_04: What is the Perfect Investment Amount?
block_05: While thoughts of winnings can be enticing, every experienced trader will confirm that the most important thing is to not lose what you have. For that, you will need to set an optimal investment amount for yourself, and this piece will help you to find it.
block_07: Simple Breakout Strategy: Pop n’ Stop
block_08: Breakout trading is not that easy to implement. Despite there being many strategies, it is hard to spot and track the breakout moment, and many traders lose their money trying to chase it. This piece shows you a new strategy that helps with that issue.
